subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast made mention of Me! Know thou that He Who is mentioned remembereth thee, and the Beloved uttereth that which rejoiceth thy heart and the hearts of them that have turned towards Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ذکرتنی فاعلم بان المذکور یذکرک و المحبوب ینطق بما یفرح به قلبک و قلوب الذین اقبلوا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
